title: Les Minecraftiens du dimanche
description: vanilla-like modpack with optimizations and some additions that enhance gameplay
body:
This is for my friends to download, and quicky have updates without the burden of having to do it manually, since they're not always all techies and just want to play.

This modpack adds performance fix and quality of life mods with in addition, some mods that improves the experience without feeling like this isn't vanilla anymore.
- Waystones
- Traveler's backpack
- Dungeons and taverns
- Geophilic
- Advanced netherite
- Structory
- ...

This modpack also makes use of a custom [VanillaTweaks](https://vanillatweaks.net/) texture pack. You can make your own there.
